summary: Iteration 7 testing of all Kalmori GitHub routes merged into the codebase. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend landing page loads correctly with all sections. All endpoints from the review request are working: CMS (slides, pricing, legal, pages, instrumentals), Cart, Credits, Payment Methods, Theme, Analytics, Kalmori Wallet, Social (follower count), Promotion Orders, Instrumental Requests, Testimonials, Admin CMS, reCAPTCHA page, and Kalmori Info.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with admin@tunedrop.com / Admin123! returns user data and sets cookie
GET /api/auth/me with cookie returns user info
GET /api/cms/instrumentals returns instrumentals content with license tiers
Frontend landing page loads with KALMORI header
Hero section with typewriter animation working
Platforms section with 6 platform cards (Spotify, Apple Music, YouTube, TikTok, Amazon, Deezer)
Why Choose section with feature list
Pricing section with FREE, UNLIMITED SINGLE, ALBUM plans
Slide-out menu opens with all navigation links
seed_data_creation: Test promotion orders and instrumental requests created during testing (TEST_Artist)
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Kalmori GitHub routes are fully functional. The kalmori_routes.py file contains CMS, Cart, Credits, Social, Testimonials, Theme, Payment Methods, Withdrawals, Analytics, Promotion Orders, Instrumental Requests, Video Serving, reCAPTCHA, and Admin CMS endpoints. Auth supports both cookies and Bearer tokens. CORS allows all origins. Admin user ID is user_ff17829e7621.
